response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, senior generalist with strong software-craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring) and some distributed-systems exposure, but the role's core hard requirement of 8 years of C++ is not met — C++ appears only in a couple of past roles (NI LabWindows/CVI components, a sound-synthesis thesis project), with the bulk of recent work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no internal cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud infrastructure ownership at the level the position demands.
strengths: Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Demonstrated mentoring/leadership via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; C++ is a minor, dated part of the background
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud infrastructure ownership
Recent focus is full-stack web/AI tooling, not infrastructure technical leadership
